zh.lifeSummary: Jöns Heggesson是Hegge的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子。他去世在瑞典。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jöns Heggesson是Hegge的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子。他去世在瑞典。

nameMeanings.name: Jöns
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: Jan
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: Jon
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: Jöns Heggesson was born as the son of Hegge. He had at least 1 son. He died in Sweden.

fr.lifeSummary: Jöns Heggesson est né, fils de Hegge. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé à Suède.

de.lifeSummary: Jöns Heggesson wurde, als Sohn von Hegge geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Jöns Heggesson è nato il come figlio di Hegge. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel Svezia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jöns HeggessonはHeggeの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼はスウェーデンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jöns Heggesson(은)는 Hegge의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 스웨덴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Jöns Heggesson nasceu filho de Hegge. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em Suécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Jöns Heggesson родился. Его отца звали Hegge. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в местности Швеция.

es.lifeSummary: Jöns Heggesson nació como hijo de Hegge. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en Suecia.

th.–: ถึงแก่กรรม
th.–Male: ถึงแก่กรรม
